mapper.select: SELECT id, cart_id, tenant_id, material_code, material_name, material_type, specifications, unit, quantity, supplier_id, supplier_name, unit_price, total_amount, source_type, source_id, source_no, source_quantity, color, fabric_composition, fabric_width, fabric_weight, merge_group_id, remark, sort_order, delete_flag, created_time, updated_time FROM t_purchase_cart_item WHERE cart_id = #{cartId} AND delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY material_type, sort_order
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM t_purchase_cart_item WHERE id IN
#{id}
